# primaryAudioSourceDeviceIdentifier

**Instance Property**

The Bluetooth address of the device providing the primary source of audio.

## Declaration

```swift
var primaryAudioSourceDeviceIdentifier: Data?
```

## Discussion

If the accessory is connected to only one device, set it as the primary device. If the accessory doesn’t support the [doc://com.apple.audioaccessorykit/documentation/AudioAccessoryKit/AccessoryControlDevice/Capabilities/audioSwitching] capability, the value of this property is always `nil`.

## Accessing configuration options

- **deviceCapabilities**: The capabilities the accessory supports.
- **devicePlacement**: The physical position of the accessory.
- **secondaryAudioSourceDeviceIdentifier**: The Bluetooth address of the device providing the secondary source of audio.
